title: Duplicate Emails
input_format: Table: Person with columns id (int, primary key), email (varchar)
output_format: Result table with column Email containing all duplicate emails
example_input:
Table: Person
| id | email   |
| 1  | a@b.com |
| 2  | c@d.com |
| 3  | a@b.com |
constraints:
- 1 <= Person.id <= 10^4
- email is a valid email string
